label: The Glareward Canteen
description: The Glareward Canteen occupies a pressurized corner off the Anchorage’s glare-shielded galleries, its ribbed hull plating left exposed as a deliberate echo of the station’s compact structural style. Narrow light-baffles and polarizing panels temper Saltharrow’s hard white radiance into a steady amber wash across bolted tables and recessed booths. A central service counter is built into a salvaged bulkhead section, while sealed vents and odor traps maintain strict air discipline against the adjacent cargo concourses. Wall placards display lane timetables and gravitic-reference advisories, fixing the room’s identity to deep-lattice turnover and precise approach vectors.
